photometric_ies_paths._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, opal diffuser, 4000K, 4500lm variant. Distribution: Lambertian per CIBSE LG7 §6.2. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade retrofit per photometric-analysis v1.0 sprint D.2; engineer-of-record substitutes project IES before final design freeze.
